name: Nilorngruppen AB
summary: Nil√É¬∂rngruppen AB produces and sells labels, packaging products, and accessories primarily in the fashion and garment industries in Nordic countries, rest of Europe, and Asia. It offers various woven, textile, and embossed labels, as well as hang tags; and packaging products, such as labelled boxes, cartons, and paper and plastic bags. The company also provides accessories, including buttons, zip pulls, buckles, silicones, leather products, etc.; and garment care labels. In addition, it offers security and anti-counterfeit products, as well as solutions for variable data/RIS applications. The company was founded in 1970 and is headquartered in Boras, Sweden.
